commands.review_summary:
The PR updates doctor security warnings and a regression test so configured trusted-proxy gateway auth lowers non-loopback exposure from a critical unauthenticated finding to a trusted-proxy warning.

PR surface: Source +11, Tests +23. Total +34 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main's doctor exposure check only treats token/password shared secrets as auth, while runtime and docs define trusted-proxy as a gateway auth mode. I did not run tests because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] There is a narrow, mechanical repair path: tighten the doctor trusted-proxy proof and add missing regression cases before this PR can merge safely.
